entity.description: Two ponds, (Isa. 15:8), probably En-eglaim of Ezek. 47:10.

nodes.label: Eglaim
nodes.description: Two ponds, (Isa. 15:8), probably En-eglaim of Ezek. 47:10.

verses.text: For the cry is gone round about the borders of Moab; the howling thereof unto Eglaim, and the howling thereof unto Beerelim.
